professional_summary.current: I am a .NET Mobile Developer focused on building and maintaining reliable mobile applications within the Microsoft ecosystem. My work emphasizes clean architecture, maintainable code, and efficient collaboration with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software. I actively integrate AI-assisted development using Windsurf, leveraging structured prompts to support implementation tasks, improve productivity, and review Pull Requests with a strong focus on code quality and maintainability. My workflow includes working with multiple development and product collaboration platforms, including Azure DevOps, Figma, and Confluence, which I use as MCP tools to support the development lifecycle. Through these platforms, I review design specifications, create and refine Product Backlog Items (PBIs), document technical solutions, and align implementation details with product and design requirements. I am comfortable translating product ideas into technical solutions by analyzing requirements, reviewing design files, documenting architecture decisions, and collaborating across engineering and product teams to deliver mobile features efficiently. My goal is to continuously improve development workflows by combining modern engineering practices with AI-assisted tooling while building scalable mobile solutions in the .NET ecosystem.

responsibilities: Designed and implemented reusable, high-performance custom controls to enhance UI consistency and maintainability across the main application.
Developed and integrated complete application workflows, ensuring smooth navigation, data handling, and seamless interaction within the core platform.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to align technical solutions with business requirements, leveraging .NET MAUI capabilities for cross-platform development.
Applied best practices in code structure, performance optimization, and maintainability to ensure scalable and future-proof application features.
